---
title: "Alice Grubbe"
---

## Alice Grubbe

**Dates:** (b.1823)

**Maiden name:** (Mackenzie)

### Description

sister of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

Youngest sister of Anne Mackenzie and of the Rt. Rev. Charles Frederick Mackenzie, she married in Natal (1861) the Rev. Charles Septimus Grubbe. (1830-1910), S. P. G. missionary at Maritzburg 1858-61 and Archdeacon of Maritzburg 1861-5.[<i>Grubbe Family</i>;  LG Mackenzie]

### Letters

- Letter from May 8th 1867
- Letter from Jany 12th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
